sentences.target: Meine Mailbox hat zwei neue Nachrichten.

translations.de: Meine Mailbox hat zwei neue Nachrichten.
translations.en: My voicemail has two new messages.
translations.es: Tengo dos mensajes nuevos en el buzón de voz.
translations.fr: J'ai deux nouveaux messages dans ma messagerie vocale.
translations.it: Ho due nuovi messaggi in segreteria.
translations.ko: 내 음성사서함에 새 메시지가 두 개 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的语音信箱有两条新留言。
translations.yue: 我嘅語音信箱有兩個新留言。
translations.ru: У меня в голосовой почте два новых сообщения.
translations.pt: Tenho duas novas mensagens no correio de voz.
translations.he: בתא הקולי שלי יש שתי הודעות חדשות.
translations.tr: Sesli postamda iki yeni mesaj var.
translations.vi: Hộp thư thoại của tôi có hai tin nhắn mới.
translations.ar: لدي رسالتان جديدتان في البريد الصوتي.
translations.nl: Ik heb twee nieuwe berichten op mijn voicemail.
translations.uk: У моїй голосовій пошті два нові повідомлення.
translations.hu: A hangpostámon két új üzenet van.
translations.hi: मेरे वॉइसमेल में दो नए संदेश हैं.
translations.pl: Mam dwie nowe wiadomości na poczcie głosowej.
translations.el: Στο φωνητικό ταχυδρομείο μου υπάρχουν δύο νέα μηνύματα.
translations.nb: Jeg har to nye meldinger på mobilsvar.
translations.id: Di kotak suara saya ada dua pesan baru.
translations.sv: Jag har två nya meddelanden i röstbrevlådan.
translations.ro: Am două mesaje noi în mesageria vocală.
translations.cs: Mám v hlasové schránce dvě nové zprávy.
translations.da: Jeg har to nye beskeder på telefonsvareren.
translations.ja: 留守電に新しいメッセージが2件ある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with a feminine singular noun; marks the subject NP in nominative.
Feminine noun; head of the subject phrase.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); takes the direct object ‘zwei neue Nachrichten’; verb in V2 position.
Cardinal numeral; modifies ‘Nachrichten’; indicates quantity of the direct object (accusative plural).
Attributive adjective; inflected to agree with ‘Nachrichten’ (accusative plural); modifies the noun.
Plural noun; head of the direct object in accusative.

sentences.target: Ich höre die Mailbox später ab.

translations.de: Ich höre die Mailbox später ab.
translations.es: Revisaré el buzón de voz más tarde.
translations.fr: Je consulterai ma messagerie vocale plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我等会儿再查语音信箱。
translations.pt: Vou verificar o correio de voz mais tarde.
translations.he: אבדוק את התא הקולי אחר כך.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ kiểm tra hộp thư thoại sau.
translations.hi: मैं वॉइसमेल बाद में चेक करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα ελέγξω το φωνητικό ταχυδρομείο αργότερα.
translations.ro: Voi verifica mesageria vocală mai târziu.
translations.ja: 留守電はあとで確認する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present) functioning as the stem of the separable verb ‘abhören’; occupies V2 position.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; marks ‘Mailbox’ as the direct object.
Feminine noun; direct object of the verb.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase, indicating time.
Separable verbal particle completing ‘abhören’; placed clause-final per German V2/separable verb syntax.

sentences.target: Die Mailbox springt zu früh an.

translations.de: Die Mailbox springt zu früh an.
translations.en: The voicemail turns on too early.
translations.es: El buzón de voz se activa demasiado pronto.
translations.fr: La messagerie vocale se déclenche trop tôt.
translations.it: La segreteria si attiva troppo presto.
translations.pt: O correio de voz é ativado cedo demais.
translations.tr: Sesli posta çok erken devreye giriyor.
translations.vi: Hộp thư thoại kích hoạt quá sớm.
translations.nl: De voicemail springt te vroeg aan.
translations.hu: A hangposta túl hamar kapcsol be.
translations.hi: वॉइसमेल बहुत जल्दी चालू हो जाता है.
translations.pl: Poczta głosowa włącza się zbyt szybko.
translations.el: Το φωνητικό ταχυδρομείο ενεργοποιείται πολύ νωρίς.
translations.cs: Hlasová schránka se zapíná příliš brzy.
translations.ja: 留守電に切り替わるのが早すぎる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; marks the subject noun.
Feminine noun; head of the subject phrase.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present) functioning as the stem of the separable verb ‘anspringen’; V2 position.
Degree adverb meaning ‘too’; intensifies the following adverb.
Adverb; modified by ‘zu’ to form the degree phrase ‘zu früh’.
Separable verbal particle completing ‘anspringen’; clause-final placement.

sentences.target: Du schaltest die Mailbox bitte aus.

translations.de: Du schaltest die Mailbox bitte aus.
translations.es: Por favor, desactiva el buzón de voz.
translations.fr: S'il te plaît, désactive la messagerie vocale.
translations.pt: Por favor, desative o correio de voz.
translations.vi: Làm ơn tắt hộp thư thoại.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject (addressee).
Finite verb (2nd person singular, present) functioning as the stem of the separable verb ‘ausschalten’; V2 position.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; marks ‘Mailbox’ as the direct object.
Feminine noun; direct object of the verb.
Politeness adverb; modifies the clause to soften the directive.
Separable verbal particle completing ‘ausschalten’; clause-final placement.

Ich höre die Mailbox später ab.
Die Mailbox springt zu früh an.
Du schaltest die Mailbox bitte aus.
